description: Create an inner `function Scene()` and `return Scene;` at the end of the function body. Inside `Scene`, destructure `var useFrame = helpers.useFrame; var ScreenOverlay = helpers.ScreenOverlay; var InfoPoint = helpers.InfoPoint;`. Define a `palette` object exactly with `{ background: "#050814", primaryGlow: "#34d399", diskHot: "#f59e0b", diskCool: "#fb7185", boundaryHighlight: "#60a5fa", panelBg: "rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.85)", panelBorder: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12)", textPrimary: "#e2e8f0", textMuted: "#94a3b8" }`. Initialize runtime params defaults if missing: `blackHoleMass` 10, `accretionRate` 0.35, `inclinationDeg` 55, `probeDistanceRs` 8, `stepIndex` 0. Use local React state: `hoveredObject`, `selectedInfo`, `probePulsePhase`, `observerPulsePhase`, `isAnimating` (default true). Create refs: `diskInnerRef`, `diskOuterRef`, `photonRingRef`, `infallGroupRef`, `probeRef`, `lensingGroupRef` using `React.useRef(null)`.

Build centered core meshes around origin `[0,0,0]`. Add low ambient and point light: `ambientLight` intensity ~0.35 and `pointLight` at `[2,3,2]` intensity ~1.2 color `#ffffff`. Render black hole shadow as `mesh` at `[0,0,0]` with `sphereGeometry` radius `1.2` and `meshStandardMaterial` color `#000000` (no emissive). Render event horizon cue as thin torus: `torusGeometry` args `[1.35, 0.03, 16, 128]`, rotation `[Math.PI/2,0,0]`, material `meshStandardMaterial` color/emissive `#60a5fa` emissiveIntensity `0.55` metalness `0.2` roughness `0.4`. Render photon sphere ring larger/brighter: torus args `[1.85, 0.05, 16, 160]`, same rotation, material color/emissive `#34d399` emissiveIntensity `0.85`.

Implement accretion disk as particle system centered at origin, tilted by inclination. Compute `inclinationRad = (runtimeState.params.inclinationDeg || 55) * Math.PI / 180`. Build two `points` systems: inner hot disk (`count=2500`, radius `1.45..2.6`, thickness based on accretion), outer cool disk (`count=2500`, radius `2.6..4.0`). Use `bufferGeometry` + `bufferAttribute` positions/colors Float32Array. Inner colors gradient from near-white/amber to `#f59e0b`; outer gradient from amber to `#fb7185`. `pointsMaterial` size `0.05-0.07`, `vertexColors:true`, `transparent:true`, `opacity` scaled by accretionRate, `depthWrite:false`. Add two thin emissive torus highlights in disk plane: inner ring radius `1.55` emissive `#ffffff` intensity `1.1`; mid ring radius `2.3` emissive `#ffaa00` intensity `0.75`. Disk thickness formula: `diskThickness = 0.08 + accretionRate * 0.35`.

Create compact starfield within ~6 radius shell and lensing arcs near BH. Use one `points` starfield (`count ~1200`) distributed on sphere radius `4.8..6.5`, colors mostly pale blue/white. Add `lensingGroupRef` group with 3-5 arc meshes (torus segments approximated by thin torus meshes at varying rotations) radii `2.1..3.2`, tube `0.015..0.03`, color `#60a5fa` with emissiveIntensity depending on mass. Position arcs around origin with varied tilt so they appear warped rings around BH. Keep all geometry within x/y/z roughly -5..5.

Add illustrative photon paths using `line` + `bufferGeometry` polylines: at least 3 curves (escape, loop, capture). Color escape/loop with `#34d399`, capture fades toward `#60a5fa` ending near horizon radius 1.35. Add infalling blobs group (`infallGroupRef`) containing 12 small spheres radius `0.05..0.09`, colors mixing `#f59e0b` and `#fb7185`, placed initially on spiral radii 3.8..2.0 in disk plane. Add probe marker group (`probeRef`) positioned at `[probeDistanceRs*0.35, 0.15, 0]` clamped so near scene center. Probe body: small box geometry `[0.18,0.12,0.12]` color `#cbd5e1`; stretch scale on x-axis for spaghettification near horizon. Add pulse beacon sphere child color/emissive `#34d399` emissiveIntensity `0.9`.

Use `useFrame((state, delta)=>{...})` guarded by `isAnimating`. Do NOT modify camera. Compute mass/accretion/inclination/probeDistance from `runtimeState.params`. Animate differential disk rotation: `diskInnerRef.current.rotation.y += delta*(0.9+accretionRate*1.6);` and outer slower `0.35+accretionRate*0.7`. Set disk x-tilt to `inclinationRad` by interpolating (`+= (target-current)*0.08`). Rotate photon sphere slowly. Update infalling blobs per-frame by advancing each blob angle and reducing radius; when radius <1.38 reset to outer radius to mimic plunge events. Time dilation: `dilation = Math.sqrt(Math.max(0.05, 1 - (2.0 / Math.max(probeDistanceRs,2.2))))`; advance `observerPulsePhase += delta*2.2`, `probePulsePhase += delta*2.2*dilation`. Spaghettification scale: `stretch = 1 + Math.max(0, (4.5 - probeDistanceRs))*0.22`; set probe scale `[stretch, 1/Math.sqrt(stretch), 1/Math.sqrt(stretch)]`. Increase lensing arc emissive with mass: `0.35 + (blackHoleMass/50)*0.8`.

Add `React.createElement(ScreenOverlay, null, ...)` with a top-left panel `div` style `{position:'absolute', top:'20px', left:'20px', width:'320px', padding:'18px', borderRadius:'12px', background:palette.panelBg, border:'1px solid '+palette.panelBorder, color:palette.textPrimary, backdropFilter:'blur(8px)', pointerEvents:'auto'}`. Include title text uppercase 10px letterSpacing 0.22em. Add 4 range sliders writing directly to `runtimeState.params` keys: `blackHoleMass` min1 max50 step1 default10; `accretionRate` min0 max1 step0.01 default0.35; `inclinationDeg` min0 max85 step1 default55; `probeDistanceRs` min2.2 max20 step0.1 default8. For each slider show label + numeric monospace value. Set `accentColor: palette.primaryGlow`. Add buttons: `RESET DEFAULTS` (set all params to defaults incl stepIndex 0) and toggle `PAUSE/RESUME` controlling local `isAnimating`. Button style per rules: radius 6px, uppercase, 11px, letterSpacing 0.1em, border panelBorder, pointerEvents auto.

Implement all 6 `InfoPoint` elements with exact labels/explanations/colors and spread positions (>=2 units apart): EVENT HORIZON at `[1.9,0.7,0.4]` color `#60a5fa`; SHADOW at `[-1.8,-0.9,0.6]` color `#050814`; PHOTON SPHERE at `[0.2,1.9,1.6]` color `#34d399`; ACCRETION DISK at `[3.2,0.3,-0.8]` color `#f59e0b`; GRAVITATIONAL LENSING at `[-3.1,1.4,-1.2]` color `#60a5fa`; TIME DILATION at `[2.6,-1.6,1.3]` color `#34d399`. Pass `onClick` handler to each to set `selectedInfo` local state `{label, explanation, color}`. Render an additional bottom-center explanation panel inside `ScreenOverlay` (allowed) at `{position:'absolute', bottom:'20px', left:'50%', transform:'translateX(-50%)', width:'460px', ... pointerEvents:'auto'}` showing selected info text.

Create steps array with 5 objects: `{instruction, concept, done}` where done expressions evaluate current params: `inclinationDeg<=10`, `blackHoleMass>=30`, `accretionRate>=0.7`, `probeDistanceRs<=4`, `probeDistanceRs<=2.6`. Read/write index from `runtimeState.params.stepIndex` default 0. Render top-right panel in `ScreenOverlay` at `{position:'absolute', top:'20px', right:'20px', width:'340px', ...}`. Include: title `SCAFFOLDED STEPS`; `Step N / 5`; instruction line bold system-ui; concept line italic Georgia muted; condition status text exactly `Condition met` in `#16A34A` or `Condition not met` in `#DC2626` with monospace bold. Add nav buttons `←` and `→` updating `runtimeState.params.stepIndex` with clamped bounds 0..4.

Add pointer handlers to core objects to satisfy interactivity: on black hole, horizon ring, photon sphere, probe, and lensing arcs use `onPointerOver`, `onPointerOut`, `onClick`. Update `hoveredObject` string state and change material emissiveIntensity/scale when hovered (e.g., horizon emissiveIntensity +0.25, probe scale *1.08 temporary). On click, set `selectedInfo` to related concept for quick access. Ensure interactive meshes set `pointerEvents` via canvas defaults and overlay elements include `pointerEvents:'auto'`. Include a small top-center hover readout in overlay showing `HOVER: <name>` with muted styling.
